message:
feat(scripts): add 19 gate runner and deterministic replay scripts

Concurrent agent added automation scripts for all new gate suites:

E2E deterministic replay wrappers (9):
- scripts/e2e/frx_verification_lane_charter_replay.sh
- scripts/e2e/frx_optimization_lane_charter_replay.sh
- scripts/e2e/frx_toolchain_lane_charter_replay.sh
- scripts/e2e/frx_governance_evidence_lane_charter_replay.sh
- scripts/e2e/frx_adoption_release_lane_charter_replay.sh
- scripts/e2e/frx_track_b_compiler_frir_spine_replay.sh
- scripts/e2e/frx_track_e_verification_fuzz_formal_coverage_sprint_replay.sh
- scripts/e2e/parser_one_lever_optimization_campaign_replay.sh
- scripts/e2e/parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard_replay.sh

Gate suite runners (10):
- scripts/run_frx_verification_lane_charter_suite.sh
- scripts/run_frx_optimization_lane_charter_suite.sh
- scripts/run_frx_toolchain_lane_charter_suite.sh
- scripts/run_frx_governance_evidence_lane_charter_suite.sh
- scripts/run_frx_adoption_release_lane_charter_suite.sh
- scripts/run_frx_track_b_compiler_frir_spine_suite.sh
- scripts/run_frx_track_e_verification_fuzz_formal_coverage_sprint_suite.sh
- scripts/run_lockstep_runner_suite.sh
- scripts/run_parser_one_lever_optimization_campaign.sh
- scripts/run_parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard.sh

Each runner supports rch-backed check + test + clippy execution modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+root_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
+cd "$root_dir"
+
+mode="${1:-ci}"
+toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-nightly}"
+target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_frx_adoption_release_lane_charter}"
+artifact_root="${FRX_ADOPTION_RELEASE_LANE_CHARTER_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/frx_adoption_release_lane_charter}"
+timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
+run_dir="${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
+manifest_path="${run_dir}/run_manifest.json"
+events_path="${run_dir}/events.jsonl"
+commands_path="${run_dir}/commands.txt"
+
+trace_id="trace-frx-adoption-release-lane-charter-${timestamp}"
+decision_id="decision-frx-adoption-release-lane-charter-${timestamp}"
+policy_id="policy-frx-adoption-release-lane-charter-v1"
+component="frx_adoption_release_lane_charter_gate"
+scenario_id="frx-10.8"
+replay_command="${0} ${mode}"
+
+mkdir -p "$run_dir"
+
+if ! command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  echo "rch is required for FRX adoption/release lane charter gate commands" >&2
+  exit 2
+fi
+
+run_rch() {
+  rch exec -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${toolchain}" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${target_dir}" "$@"
+}
+
+declare -a commands_run=()
+failed_command=""
+manifest_written=false
+
+run_step() {
+  local command_text="$1"
+  shift
+  commands_run+=("$command_text")
+  echo "==> $command_text"
+  if ! run_rch "$@"; then
+    if [[ -z "$failed_command" ]]; then
+      failed_command="$command_text"
+    fi
+    return 1
+  fi
+}
+
+run_mode() {
+  local mode_exit=0
+  case "$mode" in
+    check)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter || mode_exit=1
+      ;;
+    test)
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter || mode_exit=1
+      ;;
+    clippy)
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter -- -D warnings || mode_exit=1
+      ;;
+    ci)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter || mode_exit=1
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter || mode_exit=1
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test frx_adoption_release_lane_charter -- -D warnings || mode_exit=1
+      ;;
+    *)
+      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|ci]" >&2
+      exit 2
+      ;;
+  esac
+  return "$mode_exit"
+}
+
+write_manifest() {
+  local exit_code="${1:-0}"
+  local outcome error_code_json git_commit dirty_worktree idx comma
+
+  if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
+    return
+  fi
+  manifest_written=true
+
+  if [[ "$exit_code" -eq 0 ]]; then
+    outcome="pass"
+    error_code_json="null"
+  else
+    outcome="fail"
+    error_code_json='"FE-FRX-10-8-GATE-0001"'
+  fi
+
+  git_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"
+  if git diff --quiet --ignore-submodules HEAD -- >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+    dirty_worktree=false
+  else
+    dirty_worktree=true
+  fi
+
+  printf '%s\n' "${commands_run[@]}" >"$commands_path"
+
+  {
+    echo "{\"schema_version\":\"frx.adoption-release-lane-charter-gate.event.v1\",\"trace_id\":\"${trace_id}\",\"decision_id\":\"${decision_id}\",\"policy_id\":\"${policy_id}\",\"component\":\"${component}\",\"event\":\"gate_completed\",\"scenario_id\":\"${scenario_id}\",\"replay_command\":\"${replay_command}\",\"outcome\":\"${outcome}\",\"error_code\":${error_code_json}}"
+  } >"$events_path"
+
+  {
+    echo "{"
+    echo '  "schema_version": "frx.adoption-release-lane-charter-gate.run-manifest.v1",'
+    echo '  "bead_id": "bd-mjh3.10.8",'
+    echo "  \"component\": \"${component}\","
+    echo "  \"scenario_id\": \"${scenario_id}\","
+    echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\","
+    echo "  \"toolchain\": \"${toolchain}\","
+    echo "  \"cargo_target_dir\": \"${target_dir}\","
+    echo "  \"trace_id\": \"${trace_id}\","
+    echo "  \"decision_id\": \"${decision_id}\","
+    echo "  \"policy_id\": \"${policy_id}\","
+    echo "  \"generated_at_utc\": \"${timestamp}\","
+    echo "  \"git_commit\": \"${git_commit}\","
+    echo "  \"dirty_worktree\": ${dirty_worktree},"
+    echo "  \"outcome\": \"${outcome}\","
+    echo "  \"error_code\": ${error_code_json},"
+    if [[ -n "$failed_command" ]]; then
+      echo "  \"failed_command\": \"${failed_command}\","
+    fi
+    echo "  \"replay_command\": \"${replay_command}\","
+    echo '  "commands": ['
+    for idx in "${!commands_run[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#commands_run[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${commands_run[$idx]}\"${comma}"
+    done
+    echo "  ],"
+    echo '  "artifacts": {'
+    echo "    \"manifest\": \"${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"events\": \"${events_path}\","
+    echo "    \"commands\": \"${commands_path}\","
+    echo '    "charter_doc": "docs/FRX_ADOPTION_RELEASE_LANE_CHARTER_V1.md",'
+    echo '    "contract_json": "docs/frx_adoption_release_lane_contract_v1.json",'
+    echo '    "gate_test": "crates/franken-engine/tests/frx_adoption_release_lane_charter.rs"'
+    echo "  },"
+    echo '  "operator_verification": ['
+    echo "    \"cat ${manifest_path}\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${events_path}\","
+    echo "    \"cat ${commands_path}\","
+    echo "    \"${replay_command}\""
+    echo "  ]"
+    echo "}"
+  } >"$manifest_path"
+
+  echo "frx adoption/release lane charter manifest: ${manifest_path}"
+  echo "frx adoption/release lane charter events: ${events_path}"
+}
+
+main_exit=0
+run_mode || main_exit=$?
+write_manifest "$main_exit"
+exit "$main_exit"

+      ;;

+        || return $?
+      ;;
+    report)
+      run_report_step || return $?
+      ;;
+    ci)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_lockstep_runner --test franken_lockstep_runner_cli" \

+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_lockstep_runner --test franken_lockstep_runner_cli -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --bin franken_lockstep_runner --test franken_lockstep_runner_cli -- -D warnings \
+        || return $?
+      run_report_step || return $?
+      ;;

+      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|report|ci]" >&2

+  } >"$events_path"

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail

+
+source "${root_dir}/scripts/e2e/parser_deterministic_env.sh"
+parser_frontier_bootstrap_env
+
+mode="${1:-ci}"
+toolchain="${RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN:-nightly}"
+target_dir="${CARGO_TARGET_DIR:-/tmp/rch_target_franken_engine_parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard}"
+artifact_root="${PARSER_REGRESSION_BISECTOR_SCOREBOARD_ARTIFACT_ROOT:-artifacts/parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard}"
+timestamp="$(date -u +%Y%m%dT%H%M%SZ)"
+run_dir="${artifact_root}/${timestamp}"
+manifest_path="${run_dir}/run_manifest.json"
+events_path="${run_dir}/events.jsonl"
+commands_path="${run_dir}/commands.txt"
+
+trace_id="trace-parser-regression-bisector-scoreboard-${timestamp}"
+decision_id="decision-parser-regression-bisector-scoreboard-${timestamp}"
+policy_id="policy-parser-regression-bisector-scoreboard-v1"
+component="parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard_gate"
+replay_command="${0} ${mode}"
+
+mkdir -p "$run_dir"
+
+if ! command -v rch >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  echo "rch is required for parser regression bisector heavy commands" >&2
+  exit 2
+fi
+
+run_rch() {
+  rch exec -- env "RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=${toolchain}" "CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${target_dir}" "$@"
+}
+
+rch_reject_local_fallback() {
+  local log_path="$1"
+  if grep -Eiq 'falling back to local|fallback to local|local fallback' "$log_path"; then
+    echo "rch reported local fallback; refusing local execution for heavy command" >&2
+    return 1
+  fi
+}
+
+declare -a commands_run=()
+failed_command=""
+manifest_written=false
+
+run_step() {
+  local command_text="$1"
+  local log_path
+  shift
+  commands_run+=("$command_text")
+  echo "==> $command_text"
+  log_path="$(mktemp)"
+  if ! run_rch "$@" > >(tee "$log_path") 2>&1; then
+    rm -f "$log_path"
+    failed_command="$command_text"
+    return 1
+  fi
+  if ! rch_reject_local_fallback "$log_path"; then
+    rm -f "$log_path"
+    failed_command="${command_text} (rch-local-fallback-detected)"
+    return 1
+  fi
+  rm -f "$log_path"
+}
+
+run_mode() {
+  case "$mode" in
+    check)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard
+      ;;
+    test)
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard
+      ;;
+    clippy)
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    ci)
+      run_step "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard" \
+        cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard
+      run_step "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard" \
+        cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard
+      run_step "cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard -- -D warnings" \
+        cargo clippy -p frankenengine-engine --test parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard -- -D warnings
+      ;;
+    *)
+      echo "usage: $0 [check|test|clippy|ci]" >&2
+      exit 2
+      ;;
+  esac
+}
+
+write_manifest() {
+  local exit_code="${1:-0}"
+  local outcome error_code_json git_commit dirty_worktree idx comma
+
+  if [[ "$manifest_written" == true ]]; then
+    return
+  fi

+
+  if [[ "$exit_code" -eq 0 ]]; then

+    error_code_json="null"

+    outcome="fail"
+    error_code_json='"FE-PARSER-REGRESSION-BISECTOR-0001"'
+  fi
+
+  git_commit="$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")"

+    dirty_worktree=false
+  else
+    dirty_worktree=true
+  fi
+
+  printf '%s\n' "${commands_run[@]}" >"$commands_path"
+
+  {
+    echo "{\"schema_version\":\"franken-engine.parser-log-event.v1\",\"trace_id\":\"${trace_id}\",\"decision_id\":\"${decision_id}\",\"policy_id\":\"${policy_id}\",\"component\":\"${component}\",\"event\":\"gate_completed\",\"replay_command\":\"${replay_command}\",\"outcome\":\"${outcome}\",\"error_code\":${error_code_json}}"
+  } >"$events_path"
+
+  {
+    echo "{"
+    echo '  "schema_version": "franken-engine.parser-regression-bisector-scoreboard.run-manifest.v1",'
+    echo '  "bead_id": "bd-2mds.1.6.4",'
+    echo "  \"component\": \"${component}\"," 
+    echo "  \"mode\": \"${mode}\"," 
+    echo "  \"toolchain\": \"${toolchain}\"," 
+    echo "  \"cargo_target_dir\": \"${target_dir}\"," 
+    echo "  \"trace_id\": \"${trace_id}\"," 
+    echo "  \"decision_id\": \"${decision_id}\"," 
+    echo "  \"policy_id\": \"${policy_id}\"," 
+    echo "  \"git_commit\": \"${git_commit}\"," 
+    echo "  \"dirty_worktree\": ${dirty_worktree},"
+    echo "  \"generated_at_utc\": \"${timestamp}\"," 
+    echo "  \"outcome\": \"${outcome}\"," 
+    if [[ -n "$failed_command" ]]; then
+      echo "  \"failed_command\": \"${failed_command}\"," 
+    fi
+    echo "  \"replay_command\": \"${replay_command}\"," 
+    echo '  "commands": ['
+    for idx in "${!commands_run[@]}"; do
+      comma=","
+      if [[ "$idx" == "$(( ${#commands_run[@]} - 1 ))" ]]; then
+        comma=""
+      fi
+      echo "    \"${commands_run[$idx]}\"${comma}"

+    echo "    \"events\": \"${events_path}\","

+    echo '    "scoreboard_tests": "crates/franken-engine/tests/parser_regression_bisector_scoreboard.rs"'
+    echo "  },"
+    echo '  "operator_verification": ['

+    echo "    \"cat ${commands_path}\"," 
+    echo "    \"${replay_command}\""
+    echo "  ]"
+    echo "}"

+if ! "${root_dir}/scripts/validate_parser_log_schema.sh" --events "$events_path"; then
+  failed_command="${failed_command:-validate_parser_log_schema.sh --events ${events_path}}"
+  manifest_written=false
+  write_manifest 3
+  main_exit=3
+fi
+
+exit "$main_exit"
